overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rainy urban night in a video game environment (resembling GTA V), moving from a waterfront sidewalk past palm trees into a street intersection with parked vehicles. The scene features wet pavement reflections, street lamp illumination, and a moody storm atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked waterfront sidewalk at night, with palm trees lining the left side and water visible beyond a railing on the right. An ornate street lamp illuminates the wet concrete path as distant city buildings glow through the misty rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with parked vehicles

events.description: steps off the concrete sidewalk onto the asphalt street surface

agents.ego_description: continuing forward into the street, moving between parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan parked along the left curb, stationary

entered.detail: dark wet asphalt street surface with painted lines
red vehicle parked along the right side of the street
tall traffic signal pole with lights

segments.scene_description: Having left the sidewalk, the camera moves through the open street intersection. The asphalt glistens with rain as the camera passes between a yellow parked car on the left and a red vehicle on the right, with palm trees now visible in the distance and street lights illuminating the misty urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a secluded waterfront promenade into a rain-slicked urban intersection. It begins by gliding along a wet concrete sidewalk, passing beneath the glow of an ornate street lamp while palm trees line the left and a railing separates the path from the dark water on the right. As the camera leaves the sidewalk, the scene opens up into a wide street where the asphalt glistens with heavy rain and misty city lights. The movement then carries the viewer through the intersection, passing between a parked yellow car and a red vehicle before the perspective extends toward distant palm trees and the glowing urban horizon.
